memoryArtifacts.headline: Hemenway life sketches from family files
memoryArtifacts.description: Ralph Hemenway was born about 1600 in England. He came to America in 1632 settling in Roxbury, Mass. In July 5, 1634 he married Elizabeth Hewes, born 1603 in England. Her parents were John Hewes and M …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Life Sketch of Joshua Hemenway (son of Ralph) 1643-1726
memoryArtifacts.description:
Joshua Hemenway (Son of Ralph)
1643-1726

Joshua Hemenway was born April 9, 1643, at a time when his parents (Ralph Hemenway and Elizabeth Hewes) were part of a new settlement called Roxbury, borderin …

memoryArtifacts.headline: RALPH HEMINGWAY Great Migration Begins Pages 908-910.

popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of Ralph Hemenway (1603-1678)
popularStory.description:
RALPH HEMENWAY 
1603-1678

According to the History of Framingham, Massachusetts by J. H. Temple, Ralph Hemenway was of Roxbury, Massachusetts in 1633 (about age 30), a church member and freeman. Roxb …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joshua Hemenway於1643年4月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特時，他的父親Ralph Hemenway40歲，母親Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes39歲。他於1667年1月16日與Joanna Evans在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1716年10月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年73歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joshua Hemenway于1643年4月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特时，他的父亲Ralph Hemenway40岁，母亲Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes39岁。他于1667年1月16日与Joanna Evans在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1716年10月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年73岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Hemenway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Hemingway  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Hemingway
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from an unidentified place, recorded only in the surname, but which was probably in Southowram (Yorkshire). The origin of the placename may derive from the Old English personal name Hemma + Old English connective -ing- or the groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + weg ‘way, path, road’.

nameMeanings.name: Joshua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘God is salvation’ in Hebrew; it is borne in the Bible by the Israelite leader who took command of the Children of Israel after the death of Moses and led them, after many battles, to take possession of the Promised Land. The name, long favoured by Jews and Nonconformist Christians, enjoyed a great surge in popularity in the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American pianist and conductor  Joshua Rifkin  (  b. 1944 ) and the American-born violinist  Joshua Bell  (  b. 1967 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joshua Hemenway was born on 9 April 1643, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Ralph Hemenway, was 40 and his mother, Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes, was 39. He married Joanna Evans on 16 January 1667, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 October 1716, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joshua Hemenway est né le 9 avril 1643, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Ralph Hemenway, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Evans le 16 janvier 1667, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1716, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joshua Hemenway am 9. April 1643 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Hemenway 40 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes 39. Er hat am 16. Januar 1667 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Joanna Evans geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1716 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joshua Hemenway è nato il il 9 aprile 1643 nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Ralph Hemenway, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Evans il 16 gennaio 1667, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1716, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joshua Hemenwayが1643年4月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターで生まれた時，父Ralph Hemenwayは40歳，母Elizabeth Holbrook Hewesは39歳であった。1667年1月16日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーでJoanna Evansと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1716年10月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで73歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joshua Hemenway(이)가 1643년 4월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Hemenway(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1667년 1월 16일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 Joanna Evans(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1716년 10월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joshua Hemenway nasceu em 9 de abril de 1643, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Ralph Hemenway, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Evans em 16 de janeiro de 1667, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1716, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joshua Hemenway родился 9 апреля 1643 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Ralph Hemenway было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Evans 16 января 1667 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 октября 1716 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joshua Hemenway nació el 9 de abril de 1643, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Ralph Hemenway, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Joanna Evans el 16 de enero de 1667, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1716, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
